h1: Hello Millions Casino Review (2026): Bonuses, Games & Redemptions
metaTitle: Hello Millions Casino Review 2026: Bonuses & SC
metaDesc: Our 2026 Hello Millions review covers its 700+ games, daily Sweeps Coins, first-purchase bonus, redemption rules and where the casino is available.
intro: Hello Millions is a dual-currency sweepstakes casino that launched in 2023 and is operated by B-Two Operations (B2) out of the Isle of Man. It runs on the standard Gold Coins (for free play) and Sweepstakes Coins (redeemable) model, with a library that has grown past 700 titles. The brand leans on social-jackpot promotions, daily login rewards and a tiered first-purchase package. It is a fairly mature, well-reviewed option in the US social space, though its state availability is narrower than some rivals.
welcome: New players receive a no-purchase signup gift of roughly 15,000 Gold Coins plus 2.5 Sweepstakes Coins after registering and verifying their account. From there, an escalating first-purchase package adds extra coins on the first few top-ups, with the headline figure of about 245,000 GC and 117.5 SC representing the full value across the initial purchase tiers rather than a single buy.
daily: A 28-day progressive daily login reward is available simply for signing in, starting around 1,000 Gold Coins and 0.20 free Sweepstakes Coins and climbing over the streak. Hello Millions also publishes a postal/mail-in method for obtaining free SC without any purchase, alongside referral bonuses and social-media giveaways.
games: The lobby carries 700+ games spanning classic fruit machines, modern video slots, Hold and Win titles, table games and a live-dealer section with around 30 tables and game shows. Content comes from 25-plus studios, with names such as 3 Oaks Gaming, Relax Gaming and Habanero supplying much of the slot catalog.
redeem: Sweepstakes Coins must clear a light 1x playthrough before they can be redeemed, after which players can cash out for gift cards or bank-style cash payouts; reviews cite thresholds of roughly 10 SC for gift cards and 50 SC for cash. Requests are limited to one per 48-hour window and processing is typically quoted at up to around 10 days.
trust: Hello Millions is run by B-Two Operations (B2), registered in the Isle of Man, and operates under the US no-purchase-necessary sweepstakes model. It has accumulated thousands of user reviews with generally solid ratings on Trustpilot and app stores, giving it a reasonably established reputation for paying out.
pros: Large 700+ game library with 25+ studios and live dealer
Progressive daily login bonus plus mail-in free SC
cons: Available in fewer states than many competitors
Redemption processing can take up to about 10 days

faqs.a: Yes. It is operated by B-Two Operations (B2) under the US sweepstakes model, runs on a free-to-play structure with a no-purchase entry route, and has thousands of mostly positive third-party reviews.

faqs.q: How do I redeem prizes at Hello Millions?
faqs.a: Play through your Sweepstakes Coins once, then request a redemption from your account for a gift card or cash payout. Reviews report minimums of around 10 SC for gift cards and 50 SC for cash, with one request allowed per 48 hours.

faqs.q: Can I get free Sweepstakes Coins?
faqs.a: Yes. You get free SC at signup, through the progressive daily login reward, and via a no-purchase mail-in request, so a purchase is never required to participate.

restricted: Not available in Alabama, Connecticut, Delaware, Georgia, Idaho, Kentucky, Louisiana, Maryland, Michigan, Montana, Nevada, New Jersey, New York, Ohio, Washington and West Virginia.

h1: Shuffle.us Casino Review (2026): Crypto Sweeps, Games & Payouts
metaDesc: Our 2026 Shuffle.us review covers its crypto-enabled redemptions, 500+ games, deep VIP ladder, daily free coins and which US states are restricted.
intro: Shuffle.us is a crypto-forward US sweepstakes casino that launched in September 2025 under operator Munyon Canyon Ltd, registered in the British Virgin Islands. It runs a Gold Coins and Shuffle Cash dual-currency model, but stands apart by letting players fund and redeem in cryptocurrency. The platform pairs a large game library with one of the deepest VIP structures in the US social market and fast, near-instant crypto payouts. It is positioned for crypto-comfortable players, with transparent terms but some aggressive conditions like SC expiry.
welcome: There is no purchase required to start: new players can claim a free signup package commonly listed around 25,000 Gold Coins plus roughly 1 Shuffle Cash, sometimes higher through promo codes. First-purchase coin packages are also available for players who want to top up Gold Coins, but the redeemable Shuffle Cash entry route stays no-purchase-necessary.
daily: A progressive daily login bonus runs across the week, beginning around 5,000 GC and 0.30 SC and building to roughly 25,000 GC and 1 SC by day seven. On top of that, a free top-up feature lets players claim Gold Coins every few hours, and free Shuffle Cash is obtainable without spending.
games: Shuffle.us launched with 500+ titles drawn from around 23 licensed providers plus its own in-house Originals. The mix covers slots, live-dealer tables, RNG table games and Provably Fair instant-win Originals, with studios such as Hacksaw Gaming, Slotmill and Kalamba Games represented.
redeem: Cash redemptions require at least 100 redeemable Shuffle Cash, with prizes paid in cryptocurrency across roughly 19 supported coins. Processing is exceptionally fast: the operator states the large majority of requests clear in under a minute and approved payouts settle almost instantly on-chain, well ahead of typical sweepstakes timelines.
trust: The site is operated by Munyon Canyon Ltd out of the British Virgin Islands and publishes full Terms, Responsible Play and redemption policies. Reviews describe it as a legitimate, transparent operation, though casual players should note Shuffle Cash can expire after a period of inactivity, so balances need to be used.
pros: Crypto funding and near-instant crypto payouts
Very deep VIP ladder with early rakeback
cons: Restricted in many large states including California and New York

faqs.a: Yes. It is operated by Munyon Canyon Ltd, publishes transparent terms and responsible-play policies, and offers a no-purchase-necessary path to redeemable Shuffle Cash with documented crypto payouts.
Very fast. The operator reports most redemption requests are reviewed in under a minute, and approved prizes are paid almost instantly in cryptocurrency across roughly 19 supported coins.

faqs.q: Do I need crypto to play Shuffle.us?
faqs.a: No. You can play free with Gold Coins and earn Shuffle Cash without buying anything, but redemptions are paid in cryptocurrency, so you will need a wallet to receive cash prizes.

restricted: Not available in California, Connecticut, Delaware, Idaho, Kentucky, Michigan, Montana, Nevada, New Jersey, New York, Pennsylvania, Rhode Island, Vermont, Washington and West Virginia.

h1: MyPrize Casino Review (2026): Bonuses, Games & Redemptions
metaDesc: Our 2026 MyPrize.us review covers its 1,000+ games, Bet Together social mode, daily wheel, fast Sweeps Cash redemptions and US state availability.
intro: MyPrize.us is a fast-growing US social and sweepstakes casino launched in 2024 and operated by My Technology, Inc., based in Miami, Florida. It uses the familiar Gold Coins and Sweeps Cash dual-currency model but differentiates itself with strong social features, including a Bet Together mode and chat-enabled live-stream rooms. The library is broad at 1,000-plus games, mixing slots, table games and modern formats like Crash and Mines. Backed by a leadership team with fintech and crypto roots, it has scaled quickly and earned a reputation for quick payouts.
welcome: New users get a signup bonus wheel spin worth up to around 11,000 Gold Coins and 1.3 Sweeps Cash, with no purchase required to claim it. Coin packages are available for players who want to buy Gold Coins (which include bonus Sweeps Cash), but free entry routes remain in place so a purchase is never necessary to redeem.
daily: MyPrize uses a daily streak and login system that starts modestly and grows the longer you return, along with a daily free spin that can award up to roughly 100,000 Gold Coins and 2 Sweeps Cash. Free Sweeps Cash is also obtainable through bonuses and a no-purchase mail-in method.
games: The catalog runs past 1,000 titles, including classics like slots, blackjack and roulette plus modern games such as Crash, Mines and scratchcards. Content comes from established studios including Hacksaw Gaming, BGaming, Relax Gaming, Slotmill and Evolution for live dealer, and the Play Together social streams add a communal layer few rivals match.
redeem: Redemptions open once you hold at least 100 Sweeps Cash, with bonus SC subject to a 40x wagering requirement before withdrawal. MyPrize is known for speed, with reviews reporting requests often processed within a few hours rather than days.
trust: MyPrize is owned and operated by My Technology, Inc. of Miami, Florida, and operates as a US social casino governed by Florida law under the no-purchase-necessary sweepstakes model. It is led by founder Zach Bruch, a former Kraken executive, and has built a positive reputation for transparency and quick prize processing since launch.
pros: Large 1,000+ game library with modern formats
Standout social features like Bet Together and live streams
cons: Bonus Sweeps Cash carries a steep 40x wagering requirement
Higher 100 SC minimum before you can redeem

faqs.a: Yes. It is operated by My Technology, Inc. of Miami, Florida, runs under the US no-purchase sweepstakes model, and has a track record of fast payouts and positive reviews.

faqs.q: How long do MyPrize redemptions take?
faqs.a: MyPrize is among the faster sweepstakes brands; once you reach the minimum balance, reviews report requests are frequently processed within a few hours.

faqs.q: What is the wagering requirement on Sweeps Cash?
faqs.a: Bonus Sweeps Cash must be wagered 40 times before it can be withdrawn, and you need at least 100 SC to submit a redemption request.

restricted: Not available in California, Hawaii, Idaho, Louisiana, Michigan, Montana, Nevada, New York and Washington.

h1: Lonestar Casino Review (2026): Bonuses, Games & Redemptions
metaDesc: Our 2026 Lonestar Casino review covers its no-deposit bonus, game library, Sweeps Coins redemptions, RealPlay Tech operator and US availability.
intro: Lonestar Casino is a US sweepstakes casino that launched in March 2025 and is operated by RealPlay Tech Inc., the Delaware-based company behind sister brand RealPrize. It runs the standard Gold Coins and Sweeps Coins model, where Gold Coins are for free play and Sweeps Coins can be converted to Redeemable Sweeps Coins for cash or gift cards. As one of the newer entries, it leans on its parent operator's established compliance and payment infrastructure. The result is a straightforward, trustworthy sweeps experience aimed at US players.
welcome: Every new player gets an automatic no-deposit welcome bonus of around 100,000 Gold Coins plus 2.5 Sweeps Coins immediately after verifying their email and phone, with no promo code required. Larger first-purchase coin packages are offered for players who choose to buy Gold Coins, but the signup Sweeps Coins are granted free.
daily: Lonestar provides recurring free coin opportunities, including daily login rewards that top up Gold and Sweeps Coins for active players. As Sweeps Coins cannot be purchased directly, the brand also supports a no-purchase mail-in entry method so players can accumulate redeemable balance without spending.
games: Drawing on RealPlay Tech's provider relationships, Lonestar offers a varied library of slots, table games, instant wins, crash games and live-dealer content from licensed studios. The catalog mirrors the well-stocked RealPrize lineup, giving players a broad mix of familiar slot and table titles.
redeem: Awarded Sweeps Coins must be played through at least once before redemption, after which players need about 45 SC for gift cards and 100 SC for cash. Redemptions are capped at up to $10,000 per day, with only one open request allowed at a time.
trust: Lonestar is owned and operated by RealPlay Tech Inc., registered in Delaware, and operates in line with US sweepstakes laws. The site uses SSL encryption, partners with licensed game providers and publishes clear redemption policies, and user reviews generally praise its trustworthiness and timely prize processing.
pros: Automatic no-deposit bonus with no promo code needed
Backed by established operator RealPlay Tech
cons: Newer brand with a shorter track record
Only one redemption request can be open at a time

faqs.a: Yes. It is operated by RealPlay Tech Inc. of Delaware, the same company behind RealPrize, uses SSL encryption and licensed providers, and follows US sweepstakes laws.

faqs.q: What is the minimum to redeem at Lonestar?
faqs.a: After playing your Sweeps Coins through once, you need about 45 SC to redeem for gift cards and 100 SC for cash, with daily redemptions capped around $10,000.

faqs.q: Do I need a promo code for the Lonestar bonus?
faqs.a: No. The welcome bonus of roughly 100,000 Gold Coins and 2.5 Sweeps Coins is credited automatically once you verify your email and phone.

restricted: Excluded US states are not consistently published across sources; Lonestar follows the typical RealPlay Tech list and is unavailable in states where sweepstakes play is restricted, including Washington, Idaho, Michigan, Nevada and Montana.

h1: RealPrize Casino Review (2026): Bonuses, Games & Redemptions
metaDesc: Our 2026 RealPrize review covers its 700+ games, generous welcome package, Sweeps Coins redemptions, VIP program and RealPlay Tech operator.
intro: RealPrize is a US social and sweepstakes casino operated by RealPlay Tech Inc., registered in Delaware and also the parent of newer brand Lonestar. It runs the dual Gold Coins and Sweeps Coins model and has built a sizable library of 700-plus games spanning many formats. The brand is known for a generous layered welcome package, a seven-tier VIP program and a range of redemption methods. It is a well-established, compliance-focused option in the US sweepstakes market.
welcome: New players can unlock a large welcome package across registration and early activity, with figures cited up to around 625,000 Gold Coins plus 125 Sweeps Coins and 1,250 VIP points. The Sweeps Coins portion is granted free under the no-purchase model, and daily and recurring offers keep coin balances topped up after signup.
daily: RealPrize offers daily login bonuses and regular coin promotions that steadily build both Gold Coins and Sweeps Coins for active players. Because Sweeps Coins cannot be bought outright, the site also supports a no-purchase mail-in request so players can earn redeemable balance for free.
games: The library spans 700+ titles, including slots, table games, instant wins, crash games, card games, bingo, live dealer and game shows. Content comes from a strong provider roster that includes Betsoft, Playson, Kalamba, NetEnt, Red Tiger and Evolution Gaming, among others.
redeem: All Sweeps Coins must be wagered once before redemption, with a minimum of 45 SC and up to 10,000 SC redeemable per day. Players holding 100 or more SC can cash out via Visa, Mastercard, Skrill, bank transfer or gift card, with electronic gift cards often arriving within 24 hours and other methods taking roughly one to five days.
trust: RealPrize is operated by RealPlay Tech Inc., licensed and registered in Delaware, and abides by applicable US state and federal sweepstakes laws. It is widely regarded as a legitimate operator with a transparent redemption process and a structured seven-tier VIP program offering escalating perks.
pros: Large layered welcome package and 700+ games
Multiple redemption methods including cards and gift cards
Established operator with a seven-tier VIP program
cons: Card and bank redemptions can take up to about five days
Full welcome value is spread across signup and activity, not instant

faqs.a: Yes. RealPrize is operated by RealPlay Tech Inc., registered in Delaware, and operates under US sweepstakes laws with a transparent, documented redemption process.

faqs.q: How do I redeem prizes at RealPrize?
faqs.a: Wager your Sweeps Coins once, then redeem from 45 SC (and 100+ SC for cash methods) via Visa, Mastercard, Skrill, bank transfer or gift card, with up to 10,000 SC redeemable per day.
Electronic gift cards are the quickest and often arrive within 24 hours, while card and bank-transfer redemptions typically take around one to five days.

restricted: Excluded US states are not consistently published across sources; RealPrize follows the standard sweepstakes exclusion pattern and is unavailable in states such as Washington, Idaho, Michigan, Nevada and Montana.
